name: codex-memos-evolve
description: Reflect2Evolve-style Codex memory plugin backed by usememos/memos.

interface.shortDescription: Give Codex simpler AI-first memory in Memos: active work, decisions, traces, and compact recall.
interface.longDescription: Codex Memos Evolve gives Codex a Memos-native memory loop built for AI use: recall active work and decisions before non-trivial tasks, write compact work or decision records during execution, keep traces as supporting evidence, and maintain the memory store with minimal tool surface.
defaultPrompt: Before non-trivial Codex work, call memos_evolve_recall for relevant memory.
Use memos_evolve_write with recordType work, decision, trace, or feedback instead of separate memory tools.
Use memos_evolve_maintain with action setup to create shortcuts and with cleanup to preview or apply cleanup when memory is growing.
